query:
UPDATE lessons l
JOIN modules m ON l.module_id = m.id
JOIN courses c ON m.course_id = c.id
SET l.video_url = CASE 
  WHEN c.title LIKE '%Intermediária%' AND l.id % 3 = 0 THEN 'https://www.youtube.com/embed/PkZNo7MFNFg'
  WHEN c.title LIKE '%Intermediária%' AND l.id % 3 = 1 THEN 'https://www.youtube.com/embed/DHvZLI7Db8E'
  WHEN c.title LIKE '%Intermediária%' THEN 'https://www.youtube.com/embed/gigtS_5KOqo'
  WHEN c.title LIKE '%Avançada%' AND l.id % 3 = 0 THEN 'https://www.youtube.com/embed/TlB_eWDSMt4'
  WHEN c.title LIKE '%Avançada%' AND l.id % 3 = 1 THEN 'https://www.youtube.com/embed/l8WPWK9mS5M'
  WHEN c.title LIKE '%Avançada%' THEN 'https://www.youtube.com/embed/2QQnTRYvhlw'
  WHEN c.title LIKE '%Mobile%' AND l.id % 3 = 0 THEN 'https://www.youtube.com/embed/fDcRZJiXzIU'
  WHEN c.title LIKE '%Mobile%' AND l.id % 3 = 1 THEN 'https://www.youtube.com/embed/0-S5a0eS84c'
  WHEN c.title LIKE '%Mobile%' THEN 'https://www.youtube.com/embed/1DKtIwXxaDc'
  WHEN c.title LIKE '%Cloud%' AND l.id % 3 = 0 THEN 'https://www.youtube.com/embed/dEQjB8zF6Hy8'
  WHEN c.title LIKE '%Cloud%' AND l.id % 3 = 1 THEN 'https://www.youtube.com/embed/ZccSNzP9OAc'
  WHEN c.title LIKE '%Cloud%' THEN 'https://www.youtube.com/embed/eQAIojcsgRQ'
  WHEN c.title LIKE '%Segurança%' AND l.id % 3 = 0 THEN 'https://www.youtube.com/embed/bPiofmZAsi0'
  WHEN c.title LIKE '%Segurança%' AND l.id % 3 = 1 THEN 'https://www.youtube.com/embed/jhXCTbFnK8o'
  ELSE 'https://www.youtube.com/embed/2nnIHHLvYEw'
END
WHERE l.video_url IS NULL OR l.video_url = '';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user U12DfRhAFBW6sMR.root --database LDLtnU3Ggjm84uQbZLmZ7C --execute UPDATE lessons l
JOIN modules m ON l.module_id = m.id
JOIN courses c ON m.course_id = c.id
SET l.video_url = CASE 
  WHEN c.title LIKE '%Intermediária%' AND l.id % 3 = 0 THEN 'https://www.youtube.com/embed/PkZNo7MFNFg'
  WHEN c.title LIKE '%Intermediária%' AND l.id % 3 = 1 THEN 'https://www.youtube.com/embed/DHvZLI7Db8E'
  WHEN c.title LIKE '%Intermediária%' THEN 'https://www.youtube.com/embed/gigtS_5KOqo'
  WHEN c.title LIKE '%Avançada%' AND l.id % 3 = 0 THEN 'https://www.youtube.com/embed/TlB_eWDSMt4'
  WHEN c.title LIKE '%Avançada%' AND l.id % 3 = 1 THEN 'https://www.youtube.com/embed/l8WPWK9mS5M'
  WHEN c.title LIKE '%Avançada%' THEN 'https://www.youtube.com/embed/2QQnTRYvhlw'
  WHEN c.title LIKE '%Mobile%' AND l.id % 3 = 0 THEN 'https://www.youtube.com/embed/fDcRZJiXzIU'
  WHEN c.title LIKE '%Mobile%' AND l.id % 3 = 1 THEN 'https://www.youtube.com/embed/0-S5a0eS84c'
  WHEN c.title LIKE '%Mobile%' THEN 'https://www.youtube.com/embed/1DKtIwXxaDc'
  WHEN c.title LIKE '%Cloud%' AND l.id % 3 = 0 THEN 'https://www.youtube.com/embed/dEQjB8zF6Hy8'
  WHEN c.title LIKE '%Cloud%' AND l.id % 3 = 1 THEN 'https://www.youtube.com/embed/ZccSNzP9OAc'
  WHEN c.title LIKE '%Cloud%' THEN 'https://www.youtube.com/embed/eQAIojcsgRQ'
  WHEN c.title LIKE '%Segurança%' AND l.id % 3 = 0 THEN 'https://www.youtube.com/embed/bPiofmZAsi0'
  WHEN c.title LIKE '%Segurança%' AND l.id % 3 = 1 THEN 'https://www.youtube.com/embed/jhXCTbFnK8o'
  ELSE 'https://www.youtube.com/embed/2nnIHHLvYEw'
END
WHERE l.video_url IS NULL OR l.video_url = '';
